name: Tyler Technologies Courts & Justice API
what_it_does: Tyler Technologies Odyssey Courts & Justice REST API for court case management, e-filing, and justice system integration. Enables AI agents to manage court case filing and docket management for court operations automation, handle e-filing submission and acceptance for legal document filing workflow, access case scheduling and calendar management for court docket automation, retrieve public records and case information for legal research and court data access, manage fine and fee collection workflow for court revenue management, handle probation and supervision tracking for justice supervision workflow, access judicial analytics and caseload reporting for court performance management, retrieve warrant management and law enforcement integration for justice data exchange, manage jury management and selection for jury administration automation, and integrate Tyler Odyssey with public defender, prosecutor, and jail management systems.
use_cases: Automating e-filing from legal technology agents
Accessing case records from legal research agents
Managing court scheduling from judicial operations agents
Integrating justice data from criminal justice agents
not_for: Federal courts without Tyler Odyssey deployment
Private legal matters without court system integration
Non-US court systems without Odyssey implementation
best_when: A state or local court system using Tyler Odyssey, or a legal technology company integrating with Tyler courts, wants AI agents to automate e-filing, case access, scheduling, and justice system data exchange.
avoid_when: CRIMINAL JUSTICE DATA SENSITIVITY: Court case management contains highly sensitive criminal justice records — arrest records, victim information, juvenile records, and sealed cases; automated access must implement strict role-based access control and CJIS compliance. CJIS Security Policy — criminal history and justice data integration requires FBI CJIS Security Policy compliance (Advanced Authentication, personnel screening, encryption); non-compliant automated access is a federal criminal violation. Sealed and expunged records — automated court record sharing must check for sealed, expunged, or restricted access records; automated disclosure of sealed records creates court contempt and privacy violation liability.

auth.notes: Tyler Odyssey uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. API access via Tyler Technologies partner program. Plano, Texas HQ (Tyler Technologies). Public (TYL NYSE). Founded 1966. Tyler Technologies is the leading public sector software company. Tyler Odyssey serves 15,000+ courts in 30+ states. Competes with Journal Technologies and Thomson Reuters for court management software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual government subscription
pricing.notes: Plano, TX. Founded 1966. Public (TYL NYSE). Leading public sector software company. Tyler Odyssey in 30+ states. Competes with Journal Technologies for court management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; government SLA terms

known_agent_gotchas: CJIS SECURITY POLICY COMPLIANCE: Criminal justice data access requires FBI CJIS Security Policy compliance (Advanced Authentication, encryption, personnel screening); non-compliant automated access is a federal criminal violation for system administrators

Sealed and expunged records — automated court record access must check and respect record sealing, expungement, and restriction status; automated disclosure of sealed records creates court contempt, privacy violation, and potential civil liability

Juvenile records protection — juvenile court records have heightened confidentiality protections under state law; automated access must filter juvenile records and apply age-appropriate access controls

Victim privacy — domestic violence and sexual assault cases have victim address and information protections; automated case record access must implement victim privacy protections required by state law

E-filing court-specific rules — each jurisdiction has specific e-filing rules (document formatting, required fields, timing); automated e-filing must implement jurisdiction-specific validation before submission

Partner access requirement — Tyler Odyssey API access requires Tyler Technologies partner program enrollment; not self-service developer access; approval process for justice data access requires background screening
agent_readiness.security_notes: Court and justice. FedRAMP, CJIS, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Criminal justice and court data. CJIS compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Court management. FedRAMP, CJIS, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Criminal justice and court records. High sensitivity.
